Europe has a data centre problem. Electricity grids across the continent are struggling to keep pace with the power demands of the AI boom, planning […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> All3 raises $25m to automate construction with legged robots and AI design software https://thenextweb.com/news/all3-25m-seed-construction-robots-ai-housing Wed, 29 Apr 2026 08:00:58 +0000 TheNextWeb=f190318c8aed0c2c9422de513368e8c3 The London-founded startup wants to replace the entire construction value chain, from architect’s brief to move-in-ready building, using AI and a purpose-built on-site robot called the Mantis. Construction is the world’s largest industry by value and one of its least automated.
